H_params.source: weights: Fisher on both-axes camouflage; threshold: Youden on E2

degeneracy_check.verdict: PASS: both breach weights active, (1-C_IF) suppressed

fisher_vs_angular_control.decision: KEEP angular (diagonal-Fisher gives no material gain; no legitimate distribution family exists for a true FIM)
fisher_vs_angular_control.note: Diagonal-Gaussian proxy, NOT a true FIM.

methodology: WEIGHTS calibrated on a both-axes camouflage corpus (a≈b, g→0; property of the threat model, embedder-agnostic); THRESHOLD calibrated on the real E2 corpus (embedder-specific). Validated on E2: FPR/FNR/veto below. Fixes the a=0 N-R-axis degeneracy found in audit 2026-07-06.
honest_finding: H(x) magnitudes separate benign vs grave (AUROC 1.0) but NOT camouflaged adversarial (AUROC 0.2931). Adversarial veto needs the negation-aware verifiability cue (VER fuse).
